name: Shrimp or Crabmeat Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince or grind the cooked shrimp or crabmeat.
2. Combine the minced meat with the softened cream cheese and remaining ingredients.
3. Mix until smooth and thin if necessary, adding a little cream as needed.
4. Spread the mixture onto crackers or rounds of tossed bread.
